facts.claim: Voyager of the Seas is packed with more ways to play on your getaway. Catch a wave on the FlowRider surf simulator. Take a flavor-filled journey to the exotic Far East and find your element with rustic Italian dishes served with a contemporary flair.
The amped up Voyager of the Seas® is packed with more ways to play.
Voyager of the Seas is the lead ship of the Voyager class of cruise ships operated by Royal Caribbean International (RCI).
